category_sources: source_facts.description says it searches PDFs for strings matching regular expressions; official pdfgrep site describes it as a command-line utility to search text in PDF files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pdfgrep; official site heading is pdfgrep.
docs_sources: Official pdfgrep site links a Documentation page and summarizes features and usage context on the homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official pdfgrep homepage provides git clone https://gitlab.com/pdfgrep/pdfgrep.git and links Development to GitLab.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists pdfgrep; official site states grep-compatible search, regular expression support, and PDF text search behavior.
